inputs.label: Drywall Area
inputs.businessContext: Total square footage of drywall to be finished

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of coats of joint compound applied (e.g., tape, fill, finish)

inputs.label: Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated coverage per gallon of ready-mix joint compound

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage to account for spillage, over-application, and joint waste
